Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud monitoring.
# Category: cloud_monitoring


# AWS CloudFormation template for application stack with VPC, EC2 instances, RDS instance (PostgreSQL), S3 bucket(for file uploads) and Load Balancer
